bots often operate well with incremental complexity. Progressive disclosure keeps things simple at first and helps actors build confidence.
Activity log is the shared record that lets participants reconstruct what happened
Notification carries the cross-actor awareness signal — what changed, by whom, and whether you should look.
Explanation is the longer-form sibling of notification — how participants understand each other's reasoning, not just each other's actions.
Suggestion is co-creation in tentative form — proposing options the participants can converge on or reject without commitment.
Transparent reasoning makes the basis of collaborative decisions auditable, which is what lets participants disagree productively rather than past each other.
Bot frames the AI as a collaborator with its own modes; collaborating with a bot is a different gesture grammar than collaborating with a human.
Prompt is how humans address an AI participant; the structuring move that makes a bot legible as a collaborator rather than a tool.
Command menu is the affordance that keeps collaboration commands accessible without crowding the surface — collaboration depth without UI weight.

Dialog is the strict-modal end of the modality gradient — return to primary context is blocked until the actor resolves it.
Drawer is mid-gradient — secondary content adjacent to the primary, modal in attention but not in workflow.
Popover is the loosest transient mode — a contextual layer that yields to any other interaction.
Notification is the coordination pattern that picks where on the modality gradient a signal lands — same payload, different intrusion.
Toast is the non-modal floor of the notification gradient — visible, dismissible, never blocks.
Callout sits adjacent to toast on the modality gradient — non-modal but spatially anchored rather than ephemeral.
modal overlay for command invocation
non-modal option reveal
IA owns the labelling vocabulary; prose owns how those labels get phrased and where they tolerate ambiguity.
Intent & Interaction frames interaction as a sequence of turns; prose is what those turns are made of when they are text.
Collaboration depends on shared interpretive ground; prose is the most flexible carrier of that ground between participants.
Assistance lives largely as microcopy; each helper line is a small assistive turn made of prose.
Delegation surfaces are increasingly written rather than chosen; the prose decides what the agent sounds like and what authority it claims.
Dynamic hyperlinks are prose-as-affordance: the link text is the prose, and the move from authored phrase to actionable target is itself the prose move.
Reference links rest on a prose convention — that an authored phrase points to a canonical entity. The prose decides what counts as a name worth linking.
Deep linking surfaces a piece of system state as a shareable address; the prose around the link does the work of telling the recipient what they will land in.

Data entry is where microcopy carries most of the in-context guidance — labels, helper text, and error language are the prose surface that decides whether a form reads as instructive or as interrogation.
Status feedback is where prose makes a system state legible; the difference between 'Saved' and 'Your changes are safe' is a prose decision about register, not a state decision.
Toast is microcopy under a time constraint; the prose has one beat to be intelligible and is judged by whether it can be read at a glance.
Callout prose carries the framing for advisory content; the line between helpful and patronising is set by the prose rather than the styling.
Notification prose has to telegraph relevance fast enough that the actor can decide whether to engage; the prose is the decision-making surface, not just the message.
Explanation is sustained domain prose; the place where the library's prose voice has to scale beyond microcopy without losing precision.
Suggestion is prose-as-tentative-move; the framing has to invite without committing, and the difference between 'Try X' and 'You should X' lives entirely in the prose.
Localisation is where prose architecture meets variability — what reads as natural in one locale needs a translation strategy that protects the underlying move.
AI tuning treats voice and register as specifiable parameters; prose becomes a thing that can be tuned, not just authored.
Bot pages are mostly prose decisions — the bot is its prose, and the persona is the language.
Transparent reasoning surfaces system reasoning as readable text; the framing prose decides whether the explanation reads as transparent or as performance.
Generated content lives in tension with authored prose; the register drift between the two is one of the harder problems in the library.

Autocomplete is the narrowing form of input assistance — the option space already exists; the assistance is reducing it.
Autofill is assistance from prior state — the system already knows the value; the input just surfaces it.
Good defaults are assistance without prior state — the system picks the most likely value to save the actor a decision.
Suggestion is the proposing form of input assistance — the option space does not pre-exist; the system invents candidates.
